title: PromptMetadata
description: Schema for a prompt registry entry in CerebraLLMOps-mcp

version.description: Semantic version of the prompt (semver format)

task_types.description: Task types this prompt is designed to handle

model_binding.description: The model_id this prompt is optimized and tested for

token_budget_hint.description: Recommended token budget for this prompt

owner_mcp.description: The MCP that owns and maintains this prompt

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this prompt version

eval_suite_id.description: ID of the eval suite bound to this prompt

review_checklist_completed.description: Whether the 10-item prompt review checklist has been completed

regression_eval_result_id.description: ID of the regression eval run result for this version

reviewed_by.description: List of reviewer IDs who completed the review checklist

output_schema_id.description: JSON Schema ID for output validation, if required

source_path.description: Relative path to the prompt template file

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was first registered

activated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was promoted to active

superseded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was superseded
